description_long: This skateboard features a standard double-kick deck with a vibrant, abstract graphic design covering the underside. The deck is constructed from layered wood, likely maple, and is adorned with a chaotic mix of blue, red, purple, and white hues, giving it a street-art or graffiti-inspired appearance. The wheels are medium-sized, solid blue, and attached to metal trucks that are mounted in the typical configuration for street or park skateboards. The top of the deck is not fully visible, but the grip tape appears to be dark and possibly solid, providing traction for the rider. The trucks are metallic and standard in shape, with no visible branding or unique features. This skateboard is designed for urban environments, suitable for tricks, cruising, and general street use.
description: A standard skateboard with a colorful, abstract graffiti-style graphic on the underside, blue wheels, and metallic trucks. The deck is layered wood, and the overall look is vibrant and urban.
description_view_0: Front view showing the nose of the skateboard, blue wheels, and the colorful abstract deck graphic.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the deck, the double kicktail shape, blue wheels, and the vivid multicolored underside.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the tail of the skateboard, blue wheels, and the continuation of the abstract deck artwork.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, displaying the deck's profile, blue wheels, and the colorful graphic.
attribute_deck_graphic_design: The deck features a vibrant, abstract graffiti-style artwork with a chaotic blend of blue, red, purple, and white colors. The design is non-representational, with layered splashes and streaks, evoking an urban street-art aesthetic. No text or recognizable motifs are visible.
attribute_wheel_type: street, medium-sized, solid blue, no visible text or logos
attribute_truck_style: standard street skateboard trucks, metallic color, standard mounting, no visible branding or unique features
attribute_grip_tape_pattern: appears solid and dark, likely black, with no visible graphics or cut-outs
